text: Being here, I feel an odd mix of curiosity and unease. The darkness, sharp lines, and emptiness evoke a sense of abandonment, as if knowledge and intention linger in the room long after their creators have left. I am drawn to the traces of human presence—notes, screens, warnings—yet unsettled by their absence. My mind is alert, questioning: what happens when spaces meant for collaboration fall silent? I am both an observer and a participant in this strange pause, searching for meaning in the shadows.
